nasb.text: Because God was helping the Levites who were carrying the ark of the covenant of the Lord, they sacrificed seven bulls and seven rams.

esv.text: And because God helped the Levites who were carrying the ark of the covenant of the Lord, they sacrificed seven bulls and seven rams.

cnv.text: 神幫助了那些抬耶和華約櫃的利未人，他們就獻上七頭公牛和七隻公綿羊。

ccb.text: 耶和华上帝恩待抬约柜的利未人，他们就献上七头公牛和七只公羊为祭物。
